untranslatable_reason: The signal requires a custom calculation: V_t > (sum of V from t-5 to t-9 divided by 5) × multiplier_V. The allowed indicators do not include a 5-day lagged volume average or a configurable volume multiplier parameter. vol_ratio_20 is the closest available volume indicator but represents a 20-day ratio, not the specified 5-day lagged average with custom multiplier. The exact multiplier value is also marked as AUTHOR_SILENT (not provided).
translation_notes: Signal is volume-spike detection based on lagged average with custom multiplier. Substituted vol_ratio_20 as closest approximation, but this does not accurately represent the 5-day lagged lookback and custom multiplier specified. Hold period set to 3 days per spike_development_window parameter. Direction is NEUTRAL as per signal specification.
